entries.summary: Implement TASK-073 review-provenance-audit: a safe_read verifier that fails when implementation-grade work claims Guardian/Council review without resolvable maker/checker/council provenance. Verification gate: negative fixture with self-attested or missing review provenance must fail plus unit tests and command help metadata. Stop condition: audit-only scope; do not integrate into release-state-audit until TASK-075. QIF boundary: audit pass is structural/runtime evidence of review provenance, not proof that the review was semantically correct.
